item.title: SO_REUSEPORT
item.description: Socket migration was added in Linux 5.14. References lpc.events/event/11/contributions/946/attachments/783/1472/Socket_migration_for_SO_REUSEPORT.pdf www.youtube.com/watch .

item.title: NIC Scaling and Steering
item.description: Receive (RX) flowchart LR nic[NIC hardware buffer] irq[hard IRQ] softirq[soft IRQ] recvq[app socket queue] app[application] nic==>irq==>softirq==>recvq==>app ...

item.title: Nginx Thundering Herd Problem
item.description: Solution 1: EPOLLEXCLUSIVE flag If EPOLLEXCLUSIVE (Linux 4.5, glibc 2.24) is defined when compiling Nginx, Nginx could make use of it to reduce resource usage when volume of new connection ...

item.title: Git Partial Clone
item.description: Blobless clone git clone --filter=blob:none <url> creates a blobless clone. These clones download all reachable commits and trees while fetching blobs on-demand.

item.title: BPF development with Aya on aarch64
item.description: Prerequisites Rust toolchain Install with rustup. cargo-generate Install openssl headers first. Build bpf-linker with Nix’s LLVM bpf-linker requires LLVM 18.

item.title: BPF
item.description: BPF is a flexible and efficient virtual machine-like construct in the Linux kernel allowing to execute bytecode at various hook points in a safe manner ...

item.title: Linux Map
item.description: Process Scheduling De-Prioritize Process Network TCP TCP Kernel Parameters SNMPv2 TCP Statistics BBR Firewall Firewalld nftables Administration SysRq key BPF BPF ...

item.title: Building the Linux kernel on Copr Build Service
item.description: Preparing source repository The kernel source tar is too big to put in a regular git repository, so upstream usually does not commit it. Therefore, we need to get the source files from SRPM via dnf download --source kernel.

item.title: Building an RPM package from source
item.description: Fedora git clone src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/.. sudo dnf install fedpkg sudo usermod -a -G mock <current user> # use admin user only # Pick mock config ls /etc/mock # Build packages for Fedora 39 (AArch64) # Avoid `build` which requests build on Fedora's Koji server.
